name: pansear
flavor_texts: When it is angered, the temperature of its head tuft reaches 600° F. It uses its tuft to roast berries.
This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600° F.
Very intelligent, it roasts berries before eating them. It likes to help people.
This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600 degrees Fahrenheit.
text: Pansear is the High Temp Pokémon. It is a fire-type Pokémon. Abilities: gluttony, blaze (hidden). Base stats — HP: 50, Attack: 53, Defense: 48, Sp. Atk: 53, Sp. Def: 48, Speed: 64. Evolution line: pansear → simisear. Lore: When it is angered, the temperature of its head tuft reaches 600° F. It uses its tuft to roast berries. This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600° F. Very intelligent, it roasts berries before eating them. It likes to help people. This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600 degrees Fahrenheit.
